package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for passthrough_wrapper_interface: Wrapper structs that mostly forward one-to-one through an interface field with little added policy.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario389Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
